basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow/ Postdoctoral Fellow
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (BHU) Varanasi has released the official Senior Research Fellow/ Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT (BHU) Varanasi Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a First Class Ph.D., M.Tech, or B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering are eligible to apply through email within 21 days from the date of advertisement. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering, M.Tech with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering
qualification.details: PhD with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering (3 years research experience) M.Tech with First class in ECE and B.Tech with First class in ECE (2 years research experience) B.Tech with First class in ECE (2 years research experience)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Senior Research Fellow/Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21 days from advertisement date.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Senior Research Fellow/ Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Senior Research Fellow/ Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Senior Research Fellow/Postdoctoral Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21 days from the advertisement date. It is advisable to check the official notification for the exact date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD with First class in Electronics and Communication Engineering, or an M.Tech with First class in ECE and B.Tech with First class in ECE, or a B.Tech with First class in ECE with relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the IIT BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow/Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 42,000 to Rs. 47,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. You should prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Research Fellow/Postdoctoral Fellow.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT BHU offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the IIT BHU located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (BHU) Varanasi is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.
